title: Upfall
short_description: A free game about bouncing, dodging, and near death experiences — burst bubbles to rise, but dodge the hazards below.
description: Upfall is a game about bouncing, dodging, and near death experiences. Burst bubbles to progress upwards, but be careful to dodge the hazards in the depths. How far will your upfall be? A free game for the in betweens.
